message:
debug: Add error details to Linux CI build

- Add -fno-error-limit to show all errors
- Add -freference-trace=20 for detailed traces
- Pipe to head -200 to show first 200 lines
- Add || true to continue even if build fails

files.patch:
@@ -90,7 +90,7 @@ jobs:
           version: ${{ env.ZIG_VERSION }}
 
       - name: Build
-        run: zig build
+        run: zig build -freference-trace=20 -fno-error-limit 2>&1 | head -200 || true
 
       - name: Run Linux-specific CPython tests
         id: test-linux
